name: Binus School Simprug

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Sultan Iskandar Muda Kav. G-8, Simprug, Kebayoran Lama, Jakarta Selatan 12220, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: The word among Jakarta families is that BINUS Simprug is where you go for a full IB education at a fraction of what JIS charges.
paragraphs: The word among Jakarta families is that BINUS Simprug is where you go for a full IB education at a fraction of what JIS charges.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$5.2K – US$15K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Key results: IB Average 34, IB Pass Rate 95%.
Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Campus building, Science and computer laboratories, Library, Sports facilities, Performing arts spaces.

metaDescription: Binus School Simprug (South Jakarta). The word among Jakarta families is that BINUS Simprug is where you go for a full IB education at a fraction of what JIS charges.…
